title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Senior Credit Officer Opinion Survey on Dealer Financing Terms (FR 2034; OMB No. 7100-0325).
action: On January 13, 2025, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (90 FR 2701) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 2034. The comment period for this notice expired on March 14, 2025. The Board did not receive any comments.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Notice > 2025-07409

The comment period for this notice expired on March 14, 2025. The Board did not receive any comments.
